sections.title: Team health
sections.body_markdown:
Morale is steady; load is sustainable this sprint. On-call rotations are balanced across **@jamie**, **@sam**, **@river**.

- **Risk:** payments subsystem still has **bus factor 1**; mitigation: pairing plan plus doc sprint **week of June 1**.

sections.title: Delivery
sections.body_markdown:
- **Milestone M3** on track for **May 30**; dependency on **team B** API freeze **May 10** — confirmed.
- **Slipped:** “Reports export” by one sprint — **scope cut** to CSV-only; full XLS in follow-up epic.

sections.title: People / hiring
sections.body_markdown:
- **Open:** 1 senior backend — **2 onsite** interviews next week; target offer by **EOM**.
- **New start:** @alex ramping; buddy **@jamie**; 30-60-90 plan in Notion.

sections.title: Top 3 exec asks
sections.body_markdown:
1. **Approve** budget for load-testing vendor (quote in packet) — need **CFO** sign-off by **May 5**.
2. **Align** with product on **Q3** priority of mobile vs. API — one-slide decision **May 12**.
3. **Escalation:** cross-team dependency on **org Y**; need **Sponsor Z** in weekly sync.
